meaning: n.同父异母(或同母异父)的哥哥(或弟弟)
examples: The oil-rich Gulf states grouped in the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) should consider letting their "poor stepbrother" join the organization.
Joyce Greenberg said her family had begun investing money with Madoff after being introduced by her stepbrother.
He played a season at the University of Texas-Permian Basin, where his stepbrother was a pitcher.
Mr Gibson said Eddie's brother, stepbrother and friends had undertaken a 1, 000 mile cycle ride to raise money.
